summary: Early digital audience recording captures a magical second set with standout Let It Grow jam and electrifying HOTW>Slipknot!>Franklin's, despite the missing first‑set half.
review: The tape is an early digital audience capture that many reviewers describe as outstanding in clarity and dynamics, with microphones placed well. Musically the show shines in the second set – a long Let It Grow jam and one of the best HOTW > Slipknot! > Franklin's sequences ever recorded – though the absent half of the first set leaves the set incomplete for some listeners.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the performance (especially the second‑set jams) and note excellent audience recording quality, while a few lower scores reflect frustration over missing first‑set material.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Early digital PCM audience tape with microphones well placed; listeners report outstanding clarity, good dynamics and solid overall mix despite the incomplete first set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is highlighted as a series of magical moments with long jams; missing half of first set is noted but does not detract from the strength of the remaining material.

band_member_comments.Phil: Solid 'fat' bass tone praised, though one reviewer notes it lacks some air.
